customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Organize every sales lead and move the right conversation forward.
customers.emptyTitle: Start with your first customer lead
customers.emptyDescription: Create a customer profile, then generate follow-up language from their priorities.
customers.deleteConfirm: Deleting this customer will also remove their communication records. Continue?

form.newDescription: Capture the essentials now. You can complete the profile later.
form.editDescription: Keep the customer’s current situation accurate for better follow-up.
form.name: Customer name
form.remarkPlaceholder: Add family, timing, or driving context

profile.customerInfoDescription: The minimum context you need for the next conversation.
profile.nextActionDescription: Prepare follow-up language that fits the customer’s current stage.
profile.noRecordsDescription: Follow-up language appears here after you save it as a communication record.
profile.notFoundDescription: This customer may have been deleted or the link is no longer valid.

generator.title: Generate follow-up
generator.description: Add the context for this conversation and create an editable follow-up message.
generator.focusPlaceholder: e.g. rear-seat space and daily commuting cost
generator.objectionPlaceholder: e.g. worried about near-term price changes
generator.extraPlaceholder: e.g. available this weekend and wants trade-in information
generator.resultDescription: Edit freely. Copy only copies the text; Save record adds it to communication history.
generator.waitingDescription: Complete the context and generate a structured follow-up on the right.
generator.instructionPlaceholder: e.g. shorter, more gentle, stronger visit invitation
generator.replaceConfirm: You have edited this script. Regenerating will replace those changes. Continue?
generator.saveDescription: Give this script a memorable name so you can reuse it later.
generator.duplicateRecord: This content is already in communication records
generator.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please select the text manually.

records.title: Communication records
records.description: Review the language used and the customer context at that moment.
records.emptyDescription: Select “Save record” on the generation page and it will appear here.

saved.title: Saved scripts
saved.description: Keep polished language and reuse it in similar customer situations.
saved.emptyDescription: Save a strong version from any customer generation page.
saved.selectCustomerDescription: Choose a customer for this script. You can edit it before use.
